params.name: Polonium
params.source: Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishes (0.36%), Time Chests (1.5%), Expert Scrolls (0.95%)
params.description:
On Aug 22, 1898, the Curies discovered Polonium while processing uranium ore and named it after Poland.

Polonium is a silvery-white metal that can glow in the dark. It was discovered by the famous scientist Curies. In the experiment, asphalt and torbernite were placed on the metal sheet and the galvanometer showed that they had a strong reaction. After many comparative tests, they found this new element from the sediment, which is 400 times stronger than the rays of uranium. It is a significant …
